mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_system.login_log (user_id, username, login_ip, login_status, fail_reason, login_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{loginIp}, #{loginStatus}, #{failReason}, #{loginTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, username, login_ip AS loginIp, login_status AS loginStatus, fail_reason AS failReason, login_time AS loginTime FROM exam_system.login_log
ORDER BY login_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
